name: Aopen Inc.
summary: Aopen Inc. provides digital signage technologies in Taiwan. It offers embedded PCs, digital signage commercial PCs, medical PCs, digital signage media players, video wall controllers, chrome boxes, AOPEN intelligent control unit (AiCU), and panel computers; antimicrobial PCs; conference cameras; and mobile, palm-sized, capsule, and smart projectors. The company also provides gaming, consumer, and commercial monitors; gaming gadgets, such as gaming keyboard, mouse, RGB light stick, and display stand; and accessories, including wall mount, floor and table stand, card reader and scanner, screen protector, and WiFi/USB display solution. It serves retail, enterprises, industrial environments, healthcare, government, hospitality and leisure, QSR, finance/ banking, transportation, education, gaming, and entertainment industries. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
